---
title: "Data Wrangling in R for Ecologists"
---

Welcome to **RNR 437/537: Data Wrangling in R for Ecologists**.

This site contains course lessons and assignments organized by topic. Use the sidebar to navigate between topics. Each topic includes a lesson and a corresponding assignment; assignment pages include a link to the answer key.

## Topics

This course covers the following topics in order:

1. Spreadsheets
2. Introduction to R
3. Vectors
4. Data Tables and Pipes
5. Groups and Joins
6. Data Visualization
7. Tidy Data
8. Dates and Strings
9. Solving Bigger Problems
10. Reproducibility and File Paths
11. Version Control
12. Functions
13. Making Choices
14. Iteration
15. Geospatial Data
